title: RootGrowthPRO™ Rooting Hormone Powder with 0.25% IBA for Vigorous Plant Growth - Boost Root Development in Cuttings
features: Made with Indol-3-butyric acid that mimicks the natural auxins found in plants.
description: Product description RootGrowthPRO rooting powder is expertly designed for propagating cuttings, including ornamental plants and bonsai. Combining indole-3-butyric acid (IBA) with Japanese Matcha powder and other beneficial carriers, it promotes strong, healthy root growth while protecting against fungal and bacterial threats. Enriched with antioxidants, this formula ensures higher success rates and vigorous, resilient roots for your plants. Ingredients Indole-3butyric-acid Directions Mix with other substances to promote root growth in cuttings, including ornamental plants and bonsai. See more
